name: Eatery Passion Project (Community Food Service Platform)
bullets: Launched a food service platform with peers who shared a passion for cooking, serving weekly meals with diverse menus and maintaining high customer satisfaction through hospitality and execution.
Built a web app using React and MySQL to support operations and customer experience, including features like mobile ordering and a rewards system to improve accessibility and retention.
Led a 15-person team by managing schedules and designing menus for up to 30 customers per week, aligning the team through clear communication and attention to detail.
